title: clitoria guianensis
intro: Clitoria guianensis, also known as the butterfly pea, is a plant species belonging to the legume family Fabaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Clitoria guianensis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Clitoria guianensis can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and capsules, to utilize its medicinal properties effectively.
